METADATA.Keywords: Electrolyzer, Alkaline, Hydrogen production, Oxygen production, Water electrolysis
METADATA.Description: This model represent a dairy process for cheese production from fresh milk, using a wood and natural gas powered boiler house for utility supply. The boiler house unit also includes an amine-based post-combustion carbon capture system.
METADATA.References: [1] https://www.clean-hydrogen.europa.eu/system/files/2022-02/Clean%20Hydrogen%20JU%20SRIA%20-%20approved%20by%20GB%20-%20clean%20for%20publication%20%28ID%2013246486%29.pdf [2] https://www.frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fenrg.2018.00005/full [3] 1200 EUR/kWee (900 Large, 1800 Small) -- IEA (2019), The Future of Hydrogen, IEA, Paris https://www.iea.org/reports/the-future-of-hydrogen

AElectrolyzer.Unit Description: The main alkaline electrolysis unit that consumes water (1,000 kg/h reference) and electricity (55 kWh/kgH2) to produce hydrogen delivered to the hydrogen layer at 30 bar and oxygen routed to the internal oxyvent layer at 1 bar. It also exports a waste heat stream at 80°C (~0.30 kWh/kgH2) available for heat integration, with investment cost proportional to its electricity consumption.

FLOW VALUE.formula: =massflowThe main alkaline electrolysis unit that consumes water (1,000 kg/h reference) and electricity (55 kWh/kgH2) to produce hydrogen delivered to the hydrogen layer at 30 bar and oxygen routed to the internal oxyvent layer at 1 bar. It also exports a waste heat stream at 80°C (~0.30 kWh/kgH2) available for heat integration, with investment cost proportional to its electricity consumption.

=massflowThe main alkaline electrolysis unit that consumes water (1,000 kg/h reference) and electricity (55 kWh/kgH2) to produce hydrogen delivered to the hydrogen layer at 30 bar and oxygen routed to the internal oxyvent layer at 1 bar. It also exports a waste heat stream at 80°C (~0.30 kWh/kgH2) available for heat integration, with investment cost proportional to its electricity consumption.

O2ToProcWSU.Unit Description: Auxiliary compression unit that takes oxygen at 1 bar from the internal oxyvent routing layer and compresses it to 30 bar in three intercooled stages (1→3→10→30 bar) for supply to industrial processes such as ATR reformers or gasifiers. It consumes electricity proportional to the oxygen mass flow (~0.1157 kWh/kgO2 total) and rejects compression heat via three hot intercooler streams.

FLOW VALUE.formula: =W_net_procAuxiliary compression unit that takes oxygen at 1 bar from the internal oxyvent routing layer and compresses it to 30 bar in three intercooled stages (1→3→10→30 bar) for supply to industrial processes such as ATR reformers or gasifiers. It consumes electricity proportional to the oxygen mass flow (~0.1157 kWh/kgO2 total) and rejects compression heat via three hot intercooler streams.wsu

=massflowAuxiliary compression unit that takes oxygen at 1 bar from the internal oxyvent routing layer and compresses it to 30 bar in three intercooled stages (1→3→10→30 bar) for supply to industrial processes such as ATR reformers or gasifiers. It consumes electricity proportional to the oxygen mass flow (~0.1157 kWh/kgO2 total) and rejects compression heat via three hot intercooler streams.

=massflowAuxiliary compression unit that takes oxygen at 1 bar from the internal oxyvent routing layer and compresses it to 30 bar in three intercooled stages (1→3→10→30 bar) for supply to industrial processes such as ATR reformers or gasifiers. It consumes electricity proportional to the oxygen mass flow (~0.1157 kWh/kgO2 total) and rejects compression heat via three hot intercooler streams.

O2ToExportWSU.Unit Description: Auxiliary compression unit that takes oxygen at 1 bar from the internal oxyvent routing layer and compresses it to 200 bar in six intercooled stages (three to 30 bar then three more to 200 bar) for cylinder export to market. It consumes total electricity W_net_exportO2wsu covering all six stages and rejects compression heat via six hot intercooler streams.*

VALUE.formula: =W_net_exportAuxiliary compression unit that takes oxygen at 1 bar from the internal oxyvent routing layer and compresses it to 200 bar in six intercooled stages (three to 30 bar then three more to 200 bar) for cylinder export to market. It consumes total electricity W_net_exportO2wsu covering all six stages and rejects compression heat via six hot intercooler streams.*wsu

It consumes total electricity W_net_exportO2wsu covering all six stages and rejects compression heat via six hot intercooler streams.*

It consumes total electricity W_net_exportO2wsu covering all six stages and rejects compression heat via six hot intercooler streams.*
